column1: 成功するべく、毎日練習している。
column2: せいこうするべく、まいにちれんしゅうしている。
column3: Practising every day in order to succeed.
column8: ために = neutral purpose; べく = literary/formal purpose
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 問題を解決すべく、専門家に相談した。
column2: もんだいをかいけつすべく、せんもんかにそうだんした。
column3: I consulted an expert in order to resolve the problem.
column6: literary purpose clause preceding the main action
column8: すべく = literary contracted form of するべく
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 夢を実現すべく、彼は東京に来た。
column2: ゆめをじつげんすべく、かれはとうきょうにきた。
column3: He came to Tokyo in order to realise his dream.
column6: literary: purpose precedes movement to a destination
column8: べく appears more in written/formal Japanese than spoken
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 平和を守るべく、外交官は交渉を続けた。
column2: へいわをまもるべく、がいこうかんはこうしょうをつづけた。
column3: The diplomat continued negotiations in order to preserve peace.
column6: literary: noble purpose in formal or journalistic register
column8: べく often appears in news reporting and formal essays
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 真相を明らかにすべく、記者は調査を続けた。
column2: しんそうをあきらかにすべく、きしゃはちょうさをつづけた。
column3: The journalist continued the investigation in order to uncover the truth.
column8: べく is common in news headlines and formal narration
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 改革を進めるべく、委員会が設置された。
column2: かいかくをすすめるべく、いいんかいがせっちされた。
column3: A committee was established in order to advance the reforms.
column5: V-dict + べく + passive institutional action
column6: formal institutional purpose in official announcements
column8: べく common in government/corporate announcements
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 彼は試験に合格すべく、睡眠を削って勉強した。
column2: かれはしけんにごうかくすべく、すいみんをけずってべんきょうした。
column3: He cut back on sleep and studied in order to pass the exam.
column8: べく implies deliberate, goal-directed effort more than ために
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 貧困をなくすべく、NGOが活動を展開している。
column2: ひんこんをなくすべく、NGOがかつどうをてんかいしている。
column3: The NGO is deploying activities in order to eliminate poverty.
column6: literary purpose in formal or journalistic reporting
column8: べく used in mission statements and organisational charters
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:べく complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard
